# Contributing to Super-Cache

Super-Cache is maintained by Faisal Hanif. The project does not accept external pull requests because all source code modifications are governed by the Super-Cache Software Licence. This page explains the ways you can engage with the project.

## Reporting Bugs

Open a GitHub issue using the Bug Report template. Provide as much detail as possible. Bug reports are reviewed by Faisal Hanif and may be addressed in future releases.

## Requesting Features

Open a GitHub issue using the Feature Request template, or contact Faisal Hanif directly at imfanee@gmail.com. Feature requests may be implemented under a paid development engagement. See the project licence for details.

## Commercial Customisation

If you need Super-Cache modified for your organisation, you can purchase a Customisation Licence or engage Faisal Hanif for paid development. Contact imfanee@gmail.com.

## Security Vulnerabilities

Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities. Contact Faisal Hanif directly at imfanee@gmail.com with the subject line Super-Cache Security Vulnerability Report. See SECURITY.md for the full disclosure policy.
